li.p: The function is quadratic, so the domain is {\left(-\infty ,\infty \right)}\text{.} There are no invalid inputs for this function.

Since the formula is in vertex form, we can see that the graph of F has a vertex at {\left(-3,4\right)}\text{.} Since the leading coefficient is 3.5 which is positive, the parabola opens upward. So the range is all numbers greater than or equal to 4\text{.} So the range is {\left[4,\infty \right)}\text{.}
